## Tail effect checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] New file ends with `Tail.ts` under `src/features/tails/`
- [ ] Calls `registerTail({ id, name, description, class })`
- [ ] `id` is unique + stable
- [ ] Effect appears in Settings → Effects
- [ ] Shaders compile/link cleanly (no console errors)
